summary: Complete testing of Case Detail Page 12-point redesign. All features verified working: breadcrumb navigation, Next Actions with letter generation, horizontal Battle Preview, James Question Card, Score History graph, Outcome Predictor percentages (85/10/4/1), Recent Jurisprudence, Risk Monitor, Share modal, PDF download, James sidebar card with stats, and 8-card new case overlay in English.

1_breadcrumb_navigation.evidence: data-testid='back-btn' found with text 'My Cases', navigates to /dashboard

2_next_actions_section.evidence: 3 action items found with 'Generate letter' links, clicking triggers letter generation modal

3_letter_generation_modal.evidence: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter returns 200 with subject, body, legal_citations. Modal shows loading state then full letter content with Florida Statute citations

4_horizontal_battle_preview.evidence: 'Your arguments' (green) and 'Their arguments' (red) columns both display data from battle_preview.user_side.strongest_arguments and battle_preview.opposing_side.opposing_arguments

5_james_question_card.evidence: James Question Card visible with clickable answer buttons (3 days, 7 days, 30 days, No time period was specified). POST /api/cases/{case_id}/james-answer endpoint works

6_score_history_graph.evidence: Score History section renders SVG graph with data points from risk_score_history array

7_outcome_predictor.evidence: Outcome Predictor shows correct percentages: 85% (full resolution), 10% (negotiated settlement), 4% (partial loss), 1% (full loss)

8_recent_jurisprudence.evidence: Recent legal updates section shows 3 case law entries from CourtListener API

9_risk_monitor.evidence: 'Connect Gmail' and 'Connect Outlook' buttons visible in Risk Monitor section

10_share_modal.evidence: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/share returns share_id and token. Modal shows 'Share this case — read-only access' with link generation

11_pdf_download.evidence: Download brief button triggers jsPDF generation client-side

12_james_sidebar_card.evidence: James card shows stats: 847K+ live sources, 20 yrs experience, Live case law, #1 Legal AI

13_new_case_overlay.evidence: 8 situation cards displayed in English: landlord, threatening letter, employer, insurance, signed something, court summons, debt collector, other. '← Back to case' button closes overlay

14_sidebar_active_cases.evidence: Active cases list shows multiple cases with risk scores (85, 80, 75) and deadline warnings

james_answer_endpoint.details: Returns impact_summary, risk_adjustment, new_risk_score. Validates answer required, returns 404 for invalid case

generate_action_letter_endpoint.details: Returns subject, body, legal_citations. Returns 404 for invalid case

share_endpoint.details: Returns share_id (format: share_*), token, expires_at. GET /api/cases/{case_id}/shares lists active shares

case_data_structure.details: battle_preview has user_side.strongest_arguments and opposing_side.opposing_arguments. success_probability has correct keys (full_resolution_in_favor, negotiated_settlement, partial_loss, full_loss). risk_score_history and recent_case_law arrays populated

critical_code_review_comments: CaseDetail.js correctly implements all 12 features with proper data-testid attributes
success_probability correctly maps to full_resolution_in_favor, negotiated_settlement, partial_loss, full_loss keys
Letter generation uses Claude AI via emergentintegrations - takes a few seconds to generate
New case overlay shows 8 situation cards with EN/FR/NL translations based on user language
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded case with rich data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Detail Page 12-point redesign is fully implemented and working. Key endpoints: /api/cases/{case_id}/james-answer (AI Q&A), /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter (AI letter generation), /api/cases/{case_id}/share (share link generation). The case case_ed35bd476d0a has rich test data including battle_preview with both sides, 3 jurisprudence entries, risk_score_history, and success_probability with 85/10/4/1 percentages. james_question is populated for this case showing the James Question Card.
screenshots: .screenshots/case_detail_full.png - Full case detail page with all sections
.screenshots/letter_modal.png - Letter generation modal with AI-generated content
.screenshots/new_case_overlay_en.png - New case overlay with 8 English situation cards
